findings.title: MEAL packet signatures unimplemented
findings.description: implementation/meal.py leaves cryptographic.signature as None (TODO) and sequence.previous_packet_id hardcoded to 'prev-id'. The hash chain is unverifiable against authorship and the packet linkage is broken.

findings.title: No service or auth layer exists
findings.description: Pancake is POC-grade: no FastAPI service, no authentication, no persistence wiring. The DPI grants module (fieldlists, grant issuance, revocation) must be built from scratch on the existing MEAL/TAP/BITE primitives.

findings.title: Sprint-4 wallet docs contradict SD-JWT VC decision
findings.description: sprints/SPRINT_4_DATA_WALLETS.md specifies Hyperledger Indy/Aries, contradicting the adopted SD-JWT VC + StatusList2021 + did:web design. Doc must be rewritten to the shipped design.
